title: croton lenheirensis
intro: Croton lenheirensis, also known as the Tibetan croton or Lenheir's croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in Tibetan medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton lenheirensis are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
